commands.reason: Conversion owns local filesystem and Node converter plumbing.
Manifest integrity refresh mutates local artifact metadata.
Debug is a harnessed runtime command and must preserve browser/node parity.
Benchmark is a harnessed runtime command and must preserve browser/node parity.
Verification is the shared correctness surface for runtime and program-bundle claims.
LoRA operator commands rely on Node-side training/operator plumbing.
Distillation operator commands rely on Node-side training/operator plumbing.
Diagnose currently uses Node diagnostics and must fail closed in browser.
